Variables.Name: Fatal
Variables.Description: Always prints s fatal error to console (and log file) and crashes (even if logging is disabled)

Variables.Name: Error
Variables.Description: Prints an error to console (and log file).    Commandlets and the editor collect and report errors. Error messages result in commandlet failure.

Variables.Name: Warning
Variables.Description: Prints a warning to console (and log file).   Commandlets and the editor collect and report warnings. Warnings can be treated as an error.

Variables.Name: Display
Variables.Description: Prints a message to console (and log file)

Variables.Name: Log
Variables.Description: Prints a message to a log file (does not print to console)

Variables.Name: Verbose
Variables.Description: Prints a verbose message to a log file (if Verbose logging is enabled for the given category,     usually used for detailed logging)

Variables.Name: VeryVerbose
Variables.Description: Prints a verbose message to a log file (if VeryVerbose logging is enabled,    usually used for detailed logging that would otherwise spam output)
